# Academic Hub

> AI-powered academic integrity platform for institutions. Detects handwriting fraud, manages assignments, and streamlines grading across admin, faculty, and student roles.

Academic Hub helps colleges and universities maintain academic integrity using AI-based handwriting verification. Faculty create assignments, students submit handwritten work, and the system verifies authorship against an enrolled handwriting profile.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the platform, features, and how it works.
- [Sign In / Register](/auth): Authentication for admin, faculty, and student roles.
